revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Unichar/hexformat]]": [[WP:SEMI|semi-protecting]] highly-visible templates in response to recent template-space vandalism ([Edit=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed access] (indefinite) [Move=Require autoconfirmed or confirmed acce...
1 revision imported: trying to get rid of some red links from probably deleted pages

Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "ategory" to "ategory:qq]][[sn:"
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Text replacement - "second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Category:11]]" to ""
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
